creator: dimanenator@gmail.com
text:
If I use use external PCI SATA adapter Promise SATA300TX2 (PDC20775),
there are a lot of random error on bootable hdd.

Fix: 

Don't upgrade on 7.x. On 6.x this adapter works fine!
How-To-Repeat: System stands on SATA disk on PCI SATA adapter Promise SATA300TX2
(PDC20775).  make world from 6-x -> 7.0. 

reboot, and have many CRK errors on bootable SATA HDD.
